title: Eva stuff in Den Den Town Osaka area
display_title: Eva stuff in Den Den Town Osaka area
wikitext:
[]: Eva stuff in Den Den Town/Osaka area             Quote Post by MarcG19 » Fri Nov 11, 2011 7:35 pm As mentioned elsewhere, I'm in the Osaka area for the week and am looking for suggestions for specific places that might have eva stuff. I tried the search function butncldn't find any suggestions (and it doesn't work to well on the ipad anyway) I walked through Den Den town at 7:30 Friday, and most stores were closed, though I did find a few places. As well as a store which had a mind-boggling set of Gundam stuff taking up an entire floor, with toys/models of apparently every Gundam since the first series. Also, recommendations on discount places for new DVDs, if any, would be appreciated. I hope to pick up the new Ruoruni Kenshin prequel OVA blu-ray for less than the exorbidant fee amazon.jp charges.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Nov 11, 2011 8:19 pm How about the Osaka branch office of Nerv ? For anime stuff, the place to go in Osaka is Nipponbashi. It is the Akihabara in Osaka. You can find some places that sell 2nd hand DVD there.

[]:             Quote Post by MarcG19 » Sat Nov 12, 2011 6:04 pm symbv wrote: How about the Osaka branch office of Nerv ? For anime stuff, the place to go in Osaka is Nipponbashi. It is the Akihabara in Osaka. You can find some places that sell 2nd hand DVD there.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sat Nov 12, 2011 8:20 pm It is indeed a drinking place.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Nov 16, 2011 2:29 pm THAT IS THE BEST BAR EVER! I know what I for one am gonna do if I ever go to osaka! Tease the local accent and get drunk there. (Yeah, osakan's have a weird accent. People from tokyo sound much nicer, such pretty voices.)
